creator: owinebar@gmail.com
text:
Using Xephyr for a second display, XGetVisualInfo will return 2 identical
copies of the XVisualInfo structure for the default visual.  I noticed
it because emacs panics over it and refuses to run, but it can be seen
with xdpyinfo (output below).  Only the default visual is duplicated in
my case.

[lynn@heraclitus /usr/ports/x11-servers/xephyr/work/xorg-server-1.6.1]$ xdpyinfo -display :1

version number:    11.0
vendor string:    The X.Org Foundation
vendor release number:    10601000
X.Org version: 1.6.1
maximum request size:  16777212 bytes
motion buffer size:  256
bitmap unit, bit order, padding:    32, LSBFirst, 32
image byte order:    LSBFirst
number of supported pixmap formats:    7
supported pixmap formats:
    depth 1, bits_per_pixel 1, scanline_pad 32
    depth 4, bits_per_pixel 4, scanline_pad 32
    depth 8, bits_per_pixel 8, scanline_pad 32
    depth 15, bits_per_pixel 16, scanline_pad 32
    depth 16, bits_per_pixel 16, scanline_pad 32
    depth 24, bits_per_pixel 32, scanline_pad 32
    depth 32, bits_per_pixel 32, scanline_pad 32
